task: inspect the project and create a task spec

spec.user_goal: Inspect the project and create a task specification based on the repository contents.
must_do: Inspect the provided project structure and existing tests
Base the task spec on the current implementation of project/src/main.py
Identify the expected behavior of the add function from the code and tests
Produce a concise, actionable task specification in JSON format
must_not_do: Do not modify any project files
Do not run tests or execute code
Do not invent requirements not supported by the repository contents
Do not include markdown fences or any text outside valid JSON
deliverables: A task specification describing the add function behavior
Acceptance criteria aligned with the existing test and implementation
A clear statement of what needs to be verified or improved
done_when: The task spec reflects the repository's add function and test coverage
The output is valid JSON matching the required schema
